# Simpl

> Simpl (simpl.pro) is a digital presence team for local service businesses in the United States. It scans a business's website, Google Business Profile, reviews, and SEO, scores the whole presence from 0 to 100 (the Simpl Score), then fixes what's broken so customers find the business before its competitors. The scan is free, takes about 60 seconds, and requires no credit card.

Simpl is built for businesses whose customers search "near me": remodelers, general contractors, landscapers, detailers, home health, and other local service companies. Pricing is scoped per business on a free strategy call; there are no published prices.

## What Simpl does

- Free website + presence scan producing the Simpl Score: 0 to 100 across six graded categories (Website Foundation, Crawlability, On-Page SEO, Content & Pages, Social Presence, Google Business Profile), every finding measured from live data
- Website builds: fast, findable, schema-complete sites built to turn visitors into calls (free with a Team engagement)
- Local SEO and AI search visibility: ranking in Google Maps, the local 3-pack, organic results, and AI assistant recommendations
- Google Business Profile optimization and review/reputation management
- Paid ads management: client owns the ad account, no markup on spend
- Lead-capture automation: missed-call text-back and instant quoting

## Key pages

- [Free scan](https://simpl.pro/scan): run the free 60-second presence scan
- [How it works](https://simpl.pro/how-it-works): what the scan checks and what happens after
- [FAQ](https://simpl.pro/faq): direct answers about the score, local SEO, AI search visibility, reviews, and how Simpl works
- [Why Simpl](https://simpl.pro/about): the team and the approach
- [Contact / start](https://simpl.pro/start-now): the form; real people reply the same business day
- [Services: website build](https://simpl.pro/services/website-build)
- [Services: local SEO & AI search visibility](https://simpl.pro/services/local-seo)
- [Services: quick wins & site triage](https://simpl.pro/services/quick-wins)
- [Services: paid ads](https://simpl.pro/services/paid-ads)
- [Services: organic growth](https://simpl.pro/services/organic-growth)
- [Services: fractional CMO & strategy](https://simpl.pro/services/strategy)

## Facts

- Company: Simpl, simpl.pro, United States
- Contact: team@simpl.pro
- The scan is free and self-serve; the full report unlocks with an email address
- Every engagement starts with a free strategy call; pricing is quoted there, scoped to the business
- No long-term contracts by default; any minimum term is stated before commitment
- Findings are never fabricated: every score, rank, and competitor shown is measured from real data
